title: Even We Need Some Healing, Too
overview: Mr. Villain is a high-ranking member of the Evil League, but when he's taking a day off from world conquest, he cares mostly about work-life balance. His days off are filled with shopping, pandas, and chance encounters with familiar faces.

title: Earth Is Formidable Indeed
overview: A new recruit learns that working for Mr. Villain can involve many surprises. Mr. Villain encounters a boy at the zoo whose interest in furry animals might rival even his own.

title: The Fiends of Winter
overview: Mr. Villain continues his gradual exploration of Earth culture, as he makes his way through a winter wonderland. They say monsters lurk in the cold depths of Earth's winter, unless of course it's all a matter of perspective.

title: When Spring Comes to Town
overview: Spring has come, and that's the season for cherry blossoms and new additions to the workforce. But what little surprises can one discover that offer an escape from everyday drudgeries?

title: Magical Girl in Distress
overview: The Pink Ranger goes on a quest for a missing item, only to find help from an unlikely source. Mr. Villain cleans house and earns bonus points, then contemplates recruiting new allies in his struggle against humanity.

title: Those Who Wish in Summer
overview: Summertime means beach trips and the Tanabata Star Festival, but alien invaders only know so much about Earth culture. Meanwhile, an envious coworker looks for a way to one-up our resident panda-loving villain.

title: A Pandaful Weekend
overview: Rooney mentions reports of new panda sightings, so Mr. Villain spends his day off scouring an amusement park in search of his favorite furry friends. Along the way he learns more about the human culture he someday hopes to annihilate.

title: Gifts in the Season of White
overview: Shocking news from the zoo sets Mr. Villain up for a strange dream. And 'tis the season for mandarin orange art, Christmas presents, and some contentious internal debate about how to manage the Earth once the humans are gone.

title: The Way of Desire
overview: As the Setsubun holiday season comes around, the mind grows impulsive with seemingly small desires. But what will all the pandas in one's life have to say when it comes to questionable decisions?

title: Matters of Justice
overview: Mr. Villain takes a day off from his day off, as the Rangers take the spotlight and reflect on how they came to be where they are today. It turns out that family dynamics can be tricky, even for superheroes.

title: When the Flowers Scatter
overview: It's not easy for trees to talk to each other, when social mobility is limited at best. And everyone needs a helping hand sometimes, even misfit robots. Does Mr. Villain have the solutions?
